creator: prj@rootwyrm.com
text:
The last contact from the maintainer was more than 8 months ago in response to https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=240708 , nobody has reported any success with any of the patches we have here, what patches we do have are out of date due to ports changes, and 1.16.4 contains a known vulnerability (CVE-2018-16838) which was fixed in 1.16.5 released in April. As such, there is no possible combination of patches here which would be suitable for a commit. Additionally the version of sssd in ports currently (1.11.7) expires in less than 30 days (Python 2.7 catchall.)

Is there any expectation that this situation will change?
